Title: Validate Utente (User) Registration with Valid Data
Preconditions:
- System is running.
- No existing user with the same email.
Test Data:
- nome: "Mario"
- cognome: "Rossi"
- email: "mario.rossi@example.com"
- password: "SecurePass123!"
- isVenditore: false
- immagine: "profile.jpg"
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to user registration page.
2. Enter valid data as per Test Data.
3. Submit the form.
Expected Result:
- User account is created successfully.
- `getNome()` returns "Mario", `getCognome()` returns "Rossi", `getEmail()` returns "mario.rossi@example.com", and `isVenditore()` returns `false`.

Title: Validate Utente Registration with Invalid Email Format
Test Data:
- nome: "Luigi"
- cognome: "Bianchi"
- email: "invalid-email" (missing @ and domain)
- password: "Pass123"
- isVenditore: true
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to user registration page.
2. Enter invalid email format.
3. Submit the form.
Expected Result:
- System rejects registration.
- Error message: "Invalid email format."

Title: Validate Utente Registration with Duplicate Email
Preconditions: - System has a pre-existing user with email "test@example.com".
Test Data:
- nome: "Test"
- cognome: "User"
- email: "test@example.com" (duplicate)
- password: "Pass123"
- isVenditore: false
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to user registration page.
2. Enter duplicate email.
3. Submit the form.
Expected Result:
- System rejects registration.
- Error message: "Email already in use."

Title: Validate Cliente Notification Type Assignment
Preconditions: - A valid Utente is registered as a Cliente.
Test Steps:
1. Log in as a registered Cliente.
2. Navigate to notification settings.
3. Set notification type to "PROMOTION".
4. Save settings.
Expected Result:
- `getNotifica()` returns "PROMOTION".
- Notification preferences are updated in the system.

Title: Validate Cliente Notification Toggle (Push/In-App)
Preconditions: - A valid Cliente is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to notification management screen.
2. Toggle "Push Notification" to ON.
3. Toggle "In App Notification" to OFF.
4. Save changes.
Expected Result:
- Push notifications are enabled for the user.
- In-app notifications are disabled for the user.
- System sends a confirmation message: "Notification settings updated."

Title: Create Valid Segnalazione (Report) for a Venditore
Preconditions:
- A Cliente and a Venditore are registered.
- The Cliente is logged in.
Test Data:
- titolo: "Product Quality Issue"
- descrizione: "The product is damaged upon delivery."
- cliente: logged-in Cliente
- venditore: target Venditore
Test Steps:
1. Log in as Cliente.
2. Navigate to "Report a Problem" section.
3. Select the Venditore associated with the product.
4. Enter titolo and descrizione.
5. Submit the report.
Expected Result:
- Segnalazione is created successfully.
- `getTitolo()` returns "Product Quality Issue".
- `getDescrizione()` returns the entered text.
- Venditore receives a notification: "New report submitted."

Title: Create Segnalazione with Empty Titolo
Test Data:
- titolo: "" (empty)
- descrizione: "Product issue."
- cliente: logged-in Cliente
- venditore: target Venditore
Test Steps:
1. Log in as Cliente.
2. Navigate to "Report a Problem" section.
3. Leave titolo empty.
4. Enter descrizione.
5. Submit the report.
Expected Result:
- System rejects the report.
- Error message: "Titolo is required."

Title: Create Valid Recensione (Review) for a Venditore
Preconditions:
- A Cliente and a Venditore are registered.
- The Cliente is logged in.
Test Data:
- titolo: "Great Service"
- descrizione: "Fast delivery and friendly staff."
- voto: 5 (valid range: 1-5)
- cliente: logged-in Cliente
- venditore: target Venditore
Test Steps:
1. Log in as Cliente.
2. Navigate to "Write a Review" section.
3. Select the Venditore’s product.
4. Enter titolo, descrizione, and voto.
5. Submit the review.
Expected Result:
- Recensione is created successfully.
- `getVoto()` returns 5.
- Venditore receives a notification: "New review submitted."

Title: Create Recensione with Invalid Voto (Out of Range)
Test Data:
- titolo: "Poor Quality"
- descrizione: "Product broke after 2 days."
- voto: 6 (invalid, max allowed: 5)
- cliente: logged-in Cliente
- venditore: target Venditore
Test Steps:
1. Log in as Cliente.
2. Navigate to "Write a Review" section.
3. Enter titolo, descrizione, and voto=6.
4. Submit the review.
Expected Result:
- System rejects the review.
- Error message: "Voto must be between 1 and 5."

Title: Add Valid Prodotto (Product) as Venditore
Test Data:
- nome: "Organic Apples"
- categoria: "Fruits"
- prezzo: 2.99
- descrizione: "Freshly harvested organic apples."
- scadenza: "2024-12-31" (valid future date)
Test Steps:
1. Log in as Venditore.
2. Click on "+" button to add a product.
3. Fill all fields with valid data.
4. Click "Aggiungi" (Add).
Expected Result:
- Prodotto is added successfully.
- `getNome()` returns "Organic Apples".
- `getPrezzo()` returns 2.99.
- Product appears in the Venditore’s inventory.

Title: Add Prodotto with Negative Prezzo
Test Data:
- nome: "Broken Widget"
- categoria: "Electronics"
- prezzo: -5.00 (invalid)
- descrizione: "Defective item."
- scadenza: "2024-01-01"
Test Steps:
1. Log in as Venditore.
2. Click on "+" button to add a product.
3. Enter negative prezzo.
4. Click "Aggiungi".
Expected Result:
- System rejects the product.
- Error message: "Prezzo must be greater than 0."

Title: Modify Prodotto with Valid Updated Data
Preconditions: - A Venditore has added a product (e.g., "Organic Apples" with prezzo=2.99).
Test Data:
- Updated prezzo: 3.49
- Updated descrizione: "Organic apples, now in bulk."
Test Steps:
1. Log in as Venditore.
2. Click on the existing product ("Organic Apples").
3. Click "Modifica" (Modify).
4. Update prezzo and descrizione.
5. Click "Salva" (Save).
Expected Result:
- Product is updated successfully.
- `getPrezzo()` returns 3.49.
- `getDescrizione()` returns the updated text.
- Confirmation message: "Product updated successfully."

Title: Modify Prodotto with Empty Descrizione
Preconditions: - A Venditore has added a product.
Test Steps:
1. Log in as Venditore.
2. Click on the existing product.
3. Click "Modifica".
4. Leave descrizione empty.
5. Click "Salva".
Expected Result:
- System rejects the update.
- Error message: "Descrizione is required."

Title: Validate Product Listing Based on Accessible User Position
Preconditions:
- System has a map service integrated.
- User is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. User grants location access.
2. System checks if position is accessible.
3. User’s location is within a valid service area (e.g., GPS coordinates: 40.7128, -74.0060).
Expected Result:
- System creates and displays a product list filtered by proximity.
- List includes products from nearby Venditori.

Title: Handle Inaccessible User Position (No Location Permissions)
Test Steps:
1. User denies location access.
2. System attempts to fetch user position.
Expected Result:
- System displays an error: "Location access required to show nearby products."
- No product list is generated.

Title: Send Push Notification to Cliente
Preconditions:
- A Cliente has enabled push notifications.
- System has a new promotion for the Cliente’s preferred category.
Test Steps:
1. Venditore creates a promotion for "Fruits" category.
2. System checks Cliente’s notification settings.
3. System sends push notification to Cliente’s device.
Expected Result:
- Cliente receives a push notification: "New promotion: 20% off Organic Apples!"
- Notification is logged in the system.

Title: Send In-App Notification to Cliente
Preconditions:
- A Cliente has enabled in-app notifications.
- A Venditore adds a new product in the Cliente’s preferred category.
Test Steps:
1. Venditore adds a new product ("Organic Apples").
2. System checks Cliente’s notification settings.
3. Cliente logs in to the app.
Expected Result:
- Cliente sees an in-app notification banner: "New product added: Organic Apples!"
- Notification is logged in the system.

Title: End-to-End Flow: Cliente Submits Review → Venditore Receives Notification
Preconditions:
- A Cliente and a Venditore are registered.
- Cliente has purchased a product from Venditore.
